base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of droll_witch_idle — a character from 1986 dragon quest. Droll / Poltergeist — pink witch-creature with hat. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Droll / Poltergeist — pink witch-creature with hat; low-HP caster
